name: Ascent Capital Advisors LLP
description: African Investor. Ascent Rift Valley Fund is a US$80Million fund that closed in 2014 and has invested in assets across Uganda, Ethiopia and Kenya. The main focus has been on growth and buy-out opportunities across diverse sectors of the economy. The exclusive advisory has offices across 3 capital cities in East Africa: Addis Ababa, Kampala and Nairobi. The fund is backed by leading DFIs namely CDC, FMO, Norfund and LGT. The fund was the first to attract commitments from local pension funds in Kenya in 2014 with the Kenya Power Pension Fund (KPPF) leading on this front with US$4Mn

# About
Unique Opportunities.
# History
Ascent was founded with the goal of bridging the growth gaps between early-stage companies and larger enterprises. Prior to starting Ascent, Eric Greenberg ran Leveraged Finance for Goldman Sachs in Asia ex-Japan and was responsible for raising billions of dollars in buy-outs and pre-IPO financings.
As an active private and venture investor in his spare time, Eric was interested in bringing 'big firm' expertise and connections to high growth private companies. With this objective in mind, he set about building an advisor and stakeholder network capable of supporting his ambition and assembling a team of like-minded, proven partners. This team and network ultimately became Ascent.
# Private Markets?
Ascent focuses on unlisted and private investment opportunities. With the barriers for starting and growing new companies continuing to fall, we believe that sophisticated investors can be increasingly impactful with their capital and connections.
### [Our Investments ▸](https://www.ascentca.com/investments)
# Team
![Eric bw.jpg](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/59ddc9e2f9a61e0e4388d2e3/1524723561913-GFNA1QOUU7X7MYPUEXZP/Eric+bw.jpg)
Eric Greenberg
**Principal**
Fishing enthusiast, a passion for live concerts; gets most excited by cooking and finding unique investments. Founder of Ascent Capital Advisors.
Previously ran Leveraged Finance in Asia ex-Japan for Goldman Sachs.
![Arthur bw.jpg](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/59ddc9e2f9a61e0e4388d2e3/1524723612437-Y3UVAW68LAX6921D81TL/Arthur+bw.jpg)
Arthur Maloy
**Principal**
Squash player, video gamer; tries to stay on top of his gadgets. Especially enjoys looking at early-stage ventures.
Previously worked at Goldman Sachs.
![Fergus 3 bw.jpg](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/59ddc9e2f9a61e0e4388d2e3/1524739166624-ETBISRZY2B7QIKB6E28R/Fergus+3+bw.jpg)
Fergus Lynch
**Principal**
Beer appreciator, part-time real estate developer; luck of the Irish. Specialist in indexes and synthetic asset management.
Former Head of Deutsche Bank Asia-Pacific Research. Founding Chairman of IIC / iBoxx.
